channel.title: rubber-ducky on Sayak B
channel.description: Recent content in rubber-ducky on Sayak B

item.title: Wi-Fi Ducky
item.description: Wi-Fi Ducky Upload, save and run keystroke injections remotely with an ESP8266 + ATmega32u4 Support me and my projects on Patreon! Contents Introduction What it is How it works The benefits of adding Wi-Fi Disclaimer Installation Preparation ESP8266 Arduino ATmega32u4 Wire everything up Update ESP8266 over the Webinterface How to use it Improvements License Sources and additional Links Introduction What it is It’s a Wi-Fi controlled BadUSB device to remotely execute Ducky Scripts.
